notes.note: **Cleaner navigation:** Updated toolbar, Tab Tray, and menu make it easier to find what you need and get around faster.

Added support for closing popovers & dialogs with the Android *Back* Button, and implemented the [`CloseWatcher`][1] API for handling this in script.



  [1]: https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/CloseWatcher

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you at [Android Support][1]


  [1]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 149.0 Release
